meaning: n.[地]亚平宁页岩(一种深色微粒略含钙质的页岩)
examples: "We don't get too focused on how to make money yet, " says Patrick Scaglia, Kay's boss at HP.
Scaglia predicts the company will break even on a cash flow basis (earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation and amortization EBITDA) by 2003.
And Silvio Scaglia had a track record for keeping promises at Omnitel.
